title.en: If you say so! 네 말대로 해! 네가 그렇다면야 뭐.
title.ko: 네 말대로 해! 네가 그렇다면야 뭐.

description.en: When you don't fully agree with someone's stubbornness or claim but decide to just go along with it! Practice reacting with 네 말대로 해 and 네가 그렇다면야 뭐.
description.ko: 상대방의 고집이나 주장에 완전히 동의하기는 어렵지만, 그냥 따르기로 했을 때! 네 말대로 해와 네가 그렇다면야 뭐를 사용해 한발 물러나는 반응을 배워봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Acceptance. Skepticism. Yielding. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 저 오늘부터 건강을 위해서 일주일 동안 파인애플만 먹기로 했어요!
content.translation: John. I've decided to eat only pineapples for a week for my health starting today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Only pineapples? Mina. that doesn't sound very healthy. You need protein too!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아니에요. 제가 읽은 블로그에서는 이게 최고의 해독 다이어트라고 했단 말이에요.
content.translation: No. The blog I read said this is the best detox diet.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Well... If you say so. 네 말대로 해.
content.translation: Well... If you say so. Have it your way.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네가 그렇다면야 뭐. 말리지는 않을게요.
content.translation: If you say so. I won't stop you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 일주일 뒤에 제가 얼마나 건강해지는지 꼭 지켜보세요!
content.translation: Make sure to watch how healthy I become after a week!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말대로 해. This sounds like I'm giving up the argument.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 맞아요. 내 생각은 조금 다르지만 상대방의 고집을 꺾을 수 없을 때 써요.
content.translation: Yes. That's right. You use it when your thoughts are a bit different but you can't break the other person's stubbornness.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "그래. 네가 하고 싶은 대로 해봐"라는 양보의 의미가 담겨 있죠.
content.translation: It carries the meaning of yielding. like "Okay. do what you want to do."

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말대로 해.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then how about 네가 그렇다면야 뭐.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이 표현은 "네가 그렇다고 하니까 일단 알겠어"라는 뉘앙스예요.
content.translation: This expression has the nuance of "Since you say so. I'll take it for now."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 완전히 믿지는 않지만 일단은 수긍하고 넘어갈 때 자주 사용합니다.
content.translation: It's often used when you don't fully believe it but decide to accept it and move on for now.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네가 그렇다면야 뭐.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I want to walk 10 kilometers to save bus fare. even though it's raining.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 지금 비가 오는데 정말 10킬로미터를 걸어가겠다고요? 그냥 버스 타요!
content.translation: John. you're really going to walk 10 kilometers when it's raining right now? Just take the bus!

content.speaker: John
content.text: No. I need to save money and get some exercise. Rain is just water!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그러다가 감기 걸리면 병원비가 더 많이 나올 텐데요.
content.translation: If you catch a cold like that. the hospital bill will be more expensive.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I have a strong immune system. Trust me!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 에휴. 알겠어요. 네 말대로 해.
content.translation: Sigh. Okay. have it your way.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존이 그렇다면야 뭐. 난 말렸으니까 나중에 후회하지 마요!
content.translation: If you say so. I tried to stop you. so don't regret it later!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Don't worry. Mina. I'll see you there!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sometimes it's better to just let people learn from their own choices.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방의 의견을 존중해주면서도 내 입장을 살짝 남겨두고 싶을 때 유용한 표현들이에요.
content.translation: Right. These are useful expressions when you want to respect the other person's opinion while slightly leaving your own position.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 대화의 주도권을 부드럽게 넘겨보세요!
content.translation: Hand over the lead in the conversation smoothly with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "if you say so" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말대로 해! Have it your way!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네가 그렇다면야 뭐! If you say so!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 좋을 대로 해! Do as you please!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그렇다고 치자! Let's say it's true!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 뜻대로 하세요! Do as you wish!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가와 의견이 좁혀지지 않는다면 웃으면서 말해 보세요. 네 말대로 해!
content.translation: If you can't narrow down an opinion with someone today. try saying it with a smile. Have it your way!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 존은 가끔 고집이 너무 세요. (John is sometimes too stubborn.)
이번 한 번만 제가 양보할게요. (I'll yield just this once.)
그 말에는 미묘한 뉘앙스가 담겨 있어요. (There's a subtle nuance in those words.)
미나의 설명을 듣고 나니 수긍이 가네요. (After listening to Mina's explanation. it makes sense.)
이 제품의 품질은 제가 보증합니다. (I guarantee the quality of this product.)
저는 나쁜 의도로 말한 게 아니었어요. (I didn't mean it with bad intentions.)
